titleStmt.title: SII 17.597: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 597. (A.R. No. 552 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription mentions a land survey made in the 16th year of Śuṅgandavirttaruḷiṉadva i.e. Kulōttuṅga I.

It records a gift to Śri-Mūlasthāṉam-uḍaiyār, of land made tax-free, purchased from Brāhmaṇas in Naḍappūr alias Uttamaśōḻamaṅgalam in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, in Ediriliśōḻanallūr, a tax free dēvadāna, by Āṇḍapiḷḷai Āṇḍār. The produce from the land was to be utilised to maintain (1) three perpetual lamps, (2) servants bringing water from Kaḍuvāy for the holy bath (3) servants in the garden called Puṟṟiḍaṅgoṇḍāṉ in Nandipura alias Karuṇākaranallūr, a dēvadāṉa (4) a servant working at the śeṅgaḻunīr garden in Naḍappūr alias Uttamaśōḻamaṅgalam in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu and (5) the servant supplying hay for the cows (gōśālaisurabhigaḷ).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kulottuṅkacoḷadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu tiruvāru(r)ruṭaiyār śrīmulastāṉamuṭaiyaārkku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Ikkoyil Āṇṭapiḷḷai Āṇṭār tirununtāviḷakkukkum kaṭuvāyttirumañcaṉanir cumappārkkum tevatāṉam nantipuramāṉa karuṇākaranallū(r)ril Ivar ceyvikkiṟa puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ tirunantaṉa vaṉakku
ṭikaḷukkum ceṅkaḻunir tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ākkukaikkum paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu naṭappūrāṉa Uttamacoḻamaṅkalattu Ivarkoṇṭu viṭṭa ku ṅakaḻunir tiruppaḷittāmam Ākkum kuvaḷaikiḻavaṉukkum tirukkocālaiccuravikaḷukku vaikkol koṇṭiṭukaikkum Iṟuppatāka muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻamperum brahmadeyamāy varukiṟa
paṭiyum muṉpu Iṟaikaṭṭiṉapaṭiyun tavittu yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu pacāṉamutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu naṭappūrāṉa Uttama coḻamaṅkalattu brāhmaṇarila pārattuvāci mārāyaṉ Iṭarnikkiṉāṉum kavutavaṉ cirāḷaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal Āṇṭa piḷḷaiyāṇṭār vilai
koṇṭu Ū(r)ṟakiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāy varukiṟa Iva�ma�kiva Uṭpaṭa yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu pacāṉamutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy veṟupiṟinta Etirilicoḻanallūr �nta�ṉāl nilavopāti paḻaviṟai I 38 10 7 ḷa Uṅa�ṉāl niccayitta ḷa 3 100 7 10 8ḷa �6�3 7āvatu niccayitta ḷa 3 100 4 10 8 ḷa 1�4� nicca
yitta tanilattāl muṉpu niccayitta [nna�] 3 10 2 ḷa�nta Āka ḷa 3 100ḷa8 10 ḷa � 3� Ippaṭi tavira yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu pacāṉamutal veli 1vukku ḷa 100 7 Āka Iṟaik kaṭṭiṉa ḷa [100]ṉāl pattāṟākki ḷa4 100 7 10 7 ḷam Ittevarkku ceṅkaḻunir tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ākkukaikku kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu naṭappūrāṉa Uttamaco
ḻamaṅkalattu cuṅkanatavittaruḷiṉatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu Aḷavil niṅkalukkuṭalāka nikkina Ūruṇikuḷammāy Ivvūr brāhmaṇar pakkal Āṇṭa piḷḷaiyāṇṭār koṇṭuṭaiya piramāṇappaṭi nilamāy muṉpuṭaiyārum paḻamperun tavittu yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu pacāṉamutal Ittevarkku Iṟaiyiliyāyk kūṭṭiṉa �2pan=ta4 Āka Etirili coḻanallūr� n=ta8
Itil cuṅkantavittaruḷiṉatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu Aḷavil niṅkalukkuṭalāy nikkiṉa Ūruṇikuḷamāy yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu pacāṉa mutal ceṅkaḻunir tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ākkukaikku niṅkiṉa kuḷamuṅkaraiyum kiḻakkun=ta2pa6nikki2pa�7 � ṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ ḷa 7 100 6 10 5 100 ṉāl pattāṟākki ḷa 4 100 7 10 7 ḷa Itil Uṭaiyār śrīmulastāṉa muṭaiyār kōyilil Eriyuṉ tiruṉu
ṉtāviḷakku 2m Uṭaiyār vitiviṭaṅkadevar koyil Eriyum tirinuntāviḷakku 1m Āka tirununtāviḷakku 3 kku ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku Āka ḷ 3 100 6 10 5 kku Eṇṇai U lan=taka nikki nilam2 li ṉāl ḷā2 10 ḷam kaṭuvāyat tirumañcaṉa nir 4 100� ppārkku koṟṟukkum Ilakkaikkum Aṭaitta nilam 2liṉāl ḷa 100 2 10 ḷam puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ tirunantaṉavaṉa
kkuṭikaḷ per 4 varkku Aṭaitta nilam 2 liṉāl 3 100 2 10 ḷam kuvaḷaikiḻavaṉ Oru vanukku Aṭaitta nilam va li ḷa 10 5 ḷam tirukkocālai curavikaḷukku vaikkol tirai 2 100 5 10 ta nilam1�ṉāl I 100 2 ḷam Āka nilam7nta�kku I 4 100 7 10 7 ḷa kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu ceṟṟūrkkūṟṟattu kuṭavāyilāṉa coḻakulavallic caruppetimaṅ—
kalattu koḻuntākkum nilattup paḻam peyar tavirntu yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu pacānamutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭ Iṟaiyiliyāy veṟu piṟitta naraciṅka maṅkalam nilam 3 li ṉāl nilavopātipaḻaiṟai I 3 1000 2 100 � niccayitta Opāti Ī5 10� ḷa �nta yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu pacāna mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam
Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Innilattukku taram Eḻutip pukutāmaiyil tarameḻutip pukuntāl taravopātiyāl vanta nellu Ūriṟ curukki Innellu nilavopātikku Eṟumākil Iṟaikkaṭṭākkik koḷḷuvatu .
Digital edition of SII 17.597 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
